item.title: DeFi Daily Report 2026-03-17
item.description:
# DeFi Market Intelligence Report — 2026-03-17

**Generated at:** 2026-03-17T17:28:19.033Z

| | Price | 24h Change |
|---|---:|---:|
| BTC | $74,337 | +0.81% |
| ETH | $2,330.96 | +1.25% |

**Total Market Cap:** $2.62T (+0.31%)

## Investment Considerations

- DeFi TVL growing — capital flowing into protocols, confidence building
- Stablecoin supply increasing — new capital entering the crypto market
- DEX volume surging — high trading activity, watch for volatility
